LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-05-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS AIRBNB, INC., AND AIRBNB PAYMENTS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. THE COURT VACATES THE ORDER OF SEPTEMBER 28, 2022, THAT INADVERTENTLY GRANTED THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Continued To Sep-03-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Alexander Morrow, Esq. appearing for the defendant. No appearance for plaintiff. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The case is set for a case management conference on April 23, 2025 at 10:30AM in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

After Hearing:
Joseph Salama counsel for Plaintiff was late. No written sanctions issued. (610)
After further review, court vacates the April 23, 2025 case management conference and set it for September 3, 2025 at 10:30AM in Department 610 to give parties more time to arbitrate. (610)
